parameters-en.Mode: Specifies the type of signal sent to the Stereo Imager block. When set to "Mono In", the signal is collapsed to mono before any stereo processing.
parameters-en.Width: Controls the apparent stereo width of the signal. Values greater than 100% increase the signal's apparent stereo width. Values less than 100% narrow the signal's stereo width. At 0%, the signal is collapsed to mono.
parameters-en.Pan: Controls the balance between the signal's left and right channels. When set to L 100, only the left signal is passed through the block; when set to R 100, only the right signal is passed through the block.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
